title: Steep

The '''steep''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] [[Amphibian/Legends|amphibians]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Metellos/Legends|Metellos]]. Possessing ten-[[Centimeter/Legends|centimeter]]-thick skin, they dwelt in the sewage-filled [[Ocean/Legends|seas]] of the planet, bobbing on the surface of the [[Water/Legends|waters]]. At [[Time/Legends|night]], the carnivorous steeps wandered the alleyways of Metellos' settlements, searching for [[Youngling/Legends|children]] to eat.

==Biology and appearance==
Steeps stood on four spindly [[Limb/Legends|legs]], each of which ended with a webbed foot, and were capable of walking on land. The carnivorous [[Amphibian/Legends|amphibians]] were protected by a tough, rubbery hide of ten-[[Centimeter/Legends|centimeter]]-thick,<ref name="CCW" /> [[Color/Legends|brownish-white]] skin.<ref name="CSWE" /> Although their heads were large, their [[Brain/Legends|brains]] were small. A steep's [[Mouth/Legends|mouth]] stretched from one side of the head to the other, with two [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] located on purple stalks protruding from the tops of their heads. Similarly purple-colored growths extended down the backs of the [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="CCW" />

==Behavior==
Designated as [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]], steeps were known for their lack of intelligence and, when fighting an adversary, would continue attacking relentlessly until they themselves had been [[Death/Legends|killed]]. Steeps were named after their habit of "steeping" themselves in the sewage-filled [[Water/Legends|waters]] of their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] [[Metellos/Legends|Metellos]]' [[Ocean/Legends|seas]]. The amphibians were frequently seen floating on the surface of the water. Steeps were known to roam down Metellean alleyways at [[Time/Legends|night]] seeking [[Youngling/Legends|children]], whom they swallowed as food.<ref name="CCW" />

==History==
Steeps were native to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] planet of Metellos, discovered prior to the formation of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The sewage that built up in the seas as the planet was urbanized gave steeps a suitable habitat, while the increasingly dense population provided an ample food source.<ref name="CCW" />

==Behind the scenes==
The steep was first mentioned in [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[2003]] reference book, ''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'';<ref name="CCW" /> although it was shown first in a preview art gallery on [[Wizards.com]] in which the illustration of a steep, drawn by [[R. K. Post]] and used in the book, was shown.<ref name="CCWgallery">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20021219gallery|text=''Coruscant and the Core Worlds'' Art Gallery}}</ref> The steep was a creation of [[Daniel Wallace]], one of the authors of ''Coruscant and the Core Worlds'', who created its homeworld of Metellos for the book.<ref name="CoreTalk2">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030213coretalk2|text="Core Talk, Part 2"}}</ref>
